title: Henckelia smitinandii
taxonomy: Henckelia smitinandii is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae. It is a type of herbaceous perennial native to Thailand and Myanmar. The plant is part of the genus Henckelia, which is a group of flowering plants closely related to the genus Gesneria. The classification of Henckelia smitinandii reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary history. Further studies may be necessary to fully understand the plant's taxonomic classification.
